rulings.Case Title: 1520 GOUGH STREET, LLC VS. HANNAH STEVENSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT HANNAH STEVENSON's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment Hearing required. Defendant to present a filed endorsed copy of the proof of service of her motion to vacate and order shortening time. Defendant shall be prepared to post $3,504.81. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT JOSE ROCHA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons moot. Proof of Personal service on December 21, 2017 on file. = (501/CFH)
